title: Cisco Inter-VLAN Routing
description: Learn how to enable Layer 3 routing on a multilayer switch, configure Switch Virtual Interfaces (SVIs), and provide default gateways for VLANs.

tasks.explanation: Inter-VLAN routing configuration requires Privileged EXEC access on a Layer 3-capable switch.

tasks.hint: Use the command: 'configure terminal' or 'conf t'
tasks.explanation: SVIs and IP routing are configured from global configuration mode.

tasks.prompt: Enable IP routing on this multilayer switch.
tasks.explanation: By default, switches only switch at Layer 2. 'ip routing' activates Layer 3 forwarding so SVIs can route between VLANs.
An SVI requires the corresponding VLAN to exist before the virtual interface can be configured.
Descriptive VLAN names make it easier to match SVIs to their broadcast domains.

tasks.prompt: Enter Interface Configuration mode for the VLAN 10 SVI.
tasks.explanation: A Switch Virtual Interface (SVI) is a logical Layer 3 interface tied to a VLAN, acting as the default gateway for hosts.

tasks.prompt: Assign IP address 192.168.10.1 with subnet mask 255.255.255.0 to the VLAN 10 SVI.
tasks.explanation: Hosts in VLAN 10 use this address as their default gateway to reach other subnets and VLANs.

tasks.prompt: Enable the VLAN 10 SVI (bring it administratively up).
tasks.hint: Use the command: 'no shutdown' or 'no shut'
tasks.explanation: SVIs are administratively shut down by default. 'no shutdown' activates the interface so it can route traffic.
Each VLAN that needs routing requires its own SVI with a unique IP subnet.
The Engineering VLAN will have its own subnet and default gateway separate from Sales.

tasks.prompt: Enter Interface Configuration mode for the VLAN 20 SVI.
tasks.explanation: The VLAN 20 SVI provides Layer 3 connectivity for all hosts in the Engineering broadcast domain.

tasks.prompt: Assign IP address 192.168.20.1 with subnet mask 255.255.255.0 to the VLAN 20 SVI.
tasks.explanation: With both SVIs configured, the switch routes packets between 192.168.10.0/24 and 192.168.20.0/24 without an external router.
